message:
✨ Add repository contributions breakdown to contributor profiles (#1544)

Regenerate contributor profiles with repo_breakdown field showing per-repository
contribution statistics (bug issues, feature issues, other issues, and PRs).
This enables the Repository Contributions section in the contributor profile UI.

Fixes #1543

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
